name: numeric-age-validation
description: User story for age validation with numeric range (18-65), testing EP and BVA coverage

input.story: As a system administrator, I want to validate user age during registration so that only users between 18 and 65 years old can register.
criteria: Registration fails for negative age values
Registration fails for non-numeric age input

expectedCriteria: Registration fails for negative age values
Registration fails for non-numeric age input
